authoritative_sources.role: Portable profile, routing, lane, validation, memory, adapter, and promotion contract.
Profile membership, install policy, future repo boundary, and profile-local artifact registry.
Current implemented skill instructions, helpers, templates, and bundled references.
Generated runtime-facing candidate files for review only; never the workflow source of truth.

automation_policy.next_safe_step: Use scripts/apply_install_plan.py and scripts/apply_repo_split.py only against passing plans with --execute and a recorded --rollback-record path; do not edit global skill roots; rerun acceptance_checks after each apply.

forbidden_actions.rule: Do not write generated profile skills into global runtime roots automatically.
Do not edit generated adapter manifests or runtime SKILL.md files as the only copy of workflow logic.
Do not install the full ml-research bundle globally as a side effect of profile or repo-split work.
Do not scaffold or push a split repo until file inventory, visibility audit, validation, and compatibility checks are recorded.
Do not copy auth files, raw debug logs, local sidecar artifacts, or private memory paths into public contract, manifest, or split-repo outputs.

next_actions: ACT-065: Implement a non-mutating install-plan validator that reads this handoff contract and a generated manifest index, then reports whether a requested install or repo split would pass the review gates.
Keep real runtime writes disabled until an install plan is reviewed and the validator has focused tests.
For repo splitting, start with a source inventory and publication audit for core-ops before creating any destination repository.

review_gates.blocks_install_when: The plan uses an implicit root, a home-directory shortcut, or an inferred runtime.
review_gates.summary: The runtime, target root, and write scope are named before any plan can be accepted.

review_gates.blocks_install_when: The plan tries to install every generated manifest without explaining the profile boundary.
review_gates.summary: The profile, kernel id, runtime, and install mode are selected explicitly.

review_gates.blocks_install_when: A generated adapter file contains behavior not traceable to kernel, profile, or skill sources.
review_gates.summary: Kernels, profile-index, and skill files remain authoritative; generated manifests and runtime files are derived artifacts.

review_gates.blocks_install_when: The plan expects core-ops to override mature owner skills in a full shared root.
review_gates.summary: Runtime installation preserves kernel selection_semantics, especially core-ops profile-first behavior and full-root delegation.

review_gates.blocks_install_when: The plan writes generated profile packs into ~/.codex, ~/.agents, or ~/.claude roots by default.
review_gates.summary: Global roots are touched only for global-bootstrap or explicit maintainer/debug requests.

review_gates.blocks_install_when: The plan relies on safe_to_install_automatically or skips manual review.
review_gates.summary: A human-readable review record exists before the first real write.

review_gates.blocks_install_when: The target files may be overwritten but no snapshot or restore strategy is listed.
review_gates.summary: The plan records how to restore previous runtime files or undo repo scaffolding.

review_gates.blocks_install_when: The plan does not name focused tests, adapter smoke checks, or taxonomy validation.
review_gates.summary: The plan lists non-mutating checks before write and post-write checks after install or split.

review_gates.blocks_install_when: The plan copies local auth paths, raw session logs, private memories, or unsanitized sidecar artifacts.
review_gates.summary: Private paths, credentials, raw logs, and unpublished user memory are excluded before public repo split or global install.

review_gates.blocks_install_when: The generated or copied files contain tokens, auth paths, local private memory paths, or raw debug logs.
review_gates.summary: Runtime files and manifests must not embed credentials or machine-specific private paths.

revision_history.summary: Authorize real reviewed-plan installer and repo-split scaffolder for project-local-profile-install and repo-split-handoff modes. Global-root modes remain disabled by default. Proposal: schemas/skill-kernel/proposed-revisions/install-handoff-contract-2026-05-28.proposal.md.

rollback_policy.restore_strategy: Before real install or repo split, record target paths, previous file hashes or copy source, generated source manifest, and exact restore or delete steps in a review artifact.

claude-code.required_surface: SKILL.md frontmatter with name and description under a plugin or skill root.
claude-code.session_only_status: Temporary plugin loaded exercised skills and showed them in the skill prompt; model-choice capture was auth-blocked.

codex.required_surface: SKILL.md frontmatter with name and description under a runtime skill root.
codex.session_only_status: Manifest-exercised roots were visible and selected in isolated contexts.

cursor.required_surface: SKILL.md-style runtime directory contract is unobserved.

generic-agent.required_surface: SKILL.md-style directory with optional interface metadata when supported.

scope: Defines the review boundary before any generated adapter manifest is installed into a real runtime skill root or any profile pack is split into a separate repository.

selection_semantics_policy.core_ops_policy: core-ops is a profile-first entrypoint for isolated/profile-first installs and may delegate to mature owner skills when a full shared root is visible.
selection_semantics_policy.full_root_delegation_policy: A real install plan must not treat session-only core-ops selection as proof that core-ops should override project-local routers or owner skills in the ml-research-skills maintenance repo.

target_modes.output_contract: Must write manifest-exercise-summary.json with session_only true and global_install_modified false.
target_modes.target_root_policy: Temporary roots under /tmp or another explicit session-local root; must refuse known global skill roots.

target_modes.output_contract: A reviewed install plan must list every file to be written, every source file it was generated from, and the rollback record path before any write happens.
target_modes.target_root_policy: An initialized project root or runtime-specific project skill root must be declared; profile install_policy must allow project-local use.

target_modes.output_contract: Global bootstrap installs must name the exact skill subset, runtime targets, and reason for global scope.
target_modes.target_root_policy: Only the thin global-bootstrap profile may be installed globally by default; use the existing npx skills command, not a generated manifest installer.

target_modes.output_contract: The install plan must prove why project-local install is insufficient and how to restore the previous global skill state.
target_modes.target_root_policy: Full-bundle or profile-pack global installs are maintainer/debug only and require explicit user approval plus rollback.

target_modes.output_contract: The split handoff must list files to copy, files to exclude, profile-index changes, install commands, and compatibility tests for the source and destination repos.
target_modes.target_root_policy: A destination repo name, profile boundary, source inventory, public/private visibility audit, and validation plan must be declared before scaffolding.
